segments.text: I love you, Lord, my strength.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I called to the Lord, who is worthy of praise, and I have been saved from my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The cords of death entangled me; the torrents of destruction overwhelmed me.
The cords of the grave coiled around me; the snares of death confronted me.
In my distress I called to the Lord; I cried to my God for help. From his temple he heard my voice; my cry came before him, into his ears.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The earth trembled and quaked, and the foundations of the mountains shook; they trembled because he was angry.
Smoke rose from his nostrils; consuming fire came from his mouth, burning coals blazed out of it.
He parted the heavens and came down; dark clouds were under his feet.
He mounted the cherubim and flew; he soared on the wings of the wind.
He made darkness his covering, his canopy around him— the dark rain clouds of the sky.
Out of the brightness of his presence clouds advanced, with hailstones and bolts of lightning.
The Lord thundered from heaven; the voice of the Most High resounded.
He shot his arrows and scattered the enemy, with great bolts of lightning he routed them.
The valleys of the sea were exposed and the foundations of the earth laid bare at your rebuke, Lord, at the blast of breath from your nostrils.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He reached down from on high and took hold of me; he drew me out of deep waters.
He rescued me from my powerful enemy, from my foes, who were too strong for me.
They confronted me in the day of my disaster, but the Lord was my support.
He brought me out into a spacious place; he rescued me because he delighted in me.
The Lord has dealt with me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands he has rewarded me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I have kept the ways of the Lord; I am not guilty of turning from my God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: All his laws are before me; I have not turned away from his decrees.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have been blameless before him and have kept myself from sin.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord has rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in his sight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: To the faithful you show yourself faithful, to the blameless you show yourself blameless,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: to the pure you show yourself pure, but to the devious you show yourself shrewd.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You save the humble but bring low those whose eyes are haughty.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, Lord, keep my lamp burning; my God turns my darkness into light.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With your help I can advance against a troop; with my God I can scale a wall.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: As for God, his way is perfect: The Lord's word is flawless; he shields all who take refuge in him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For who is God besides the Lord? And who is the Rock except our God?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: It is God who arms me with strength and keeps my way secure.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He makes my feet like the feet of a deer; he causes me to stand on the heights.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He trains my hands for battle; my arms can bend a bow of bronze.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You make your saving help my shield, and your right hand sustains me; your help has made me great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You provide a broad path for my feet, so that my ankles do not give way.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I pursued my enemies and overtook them; I did not turn back till they were destroyed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I crushed them so that they could not rise; they fell beneath my feet.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You armed me with strength for battle; you humbled my adversaries before me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You made my enemies turn their backs in flight, and I destroyed my foes.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They cried for help, but there was no one to save them— to the Lord, but he did not answer.
I beat them as fine as windblown dust; I trampled them like mud in the streets.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have delivered me from the attacks of the people; you have made me the head of nations. People I did not know now serve me,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: foreigners cower before me; as soon as they hear of me, they obey me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They all lose heart; they come trembling from their strongholds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord lives! Praise be to my Rock! Exalted be God my Savior!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He is the God who avenges me, who subdues nations under me,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: who saves me from my enemies. You exalted me above my foes; from a violent man you rescued me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Therefore I will praise you, Lord, among the nations; I will sing the praises of your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He gives his king great victories; he shows unfailing love to his anointed, to David and to his descendants forever.
segments.speaker: David
